summary: Current 13-station anchor-wave prototype with Chelsea, Williamsburg, Atlantic Terminal, and Hoboken added as first-ring local expansions.
designGoals: Keep the board graph-first and readable before expanding to the next wave.
Use local station additions to create strategic branching without collapsing into dense route overlap.
Preserve clear west-side, core-Manhattan, and Brooklyn/Queens identities.
changeSummary: Expanded the original 9-station anchor set to 13 active stations.
Added first-ring local connectors: Chelsea, Williamsburg, Atlantic Terminal, and Hoboken.
Split the Brooklyn/Jamaica corridor through Atlantic Terminal and widened the west-side fan through Hoboken.
playtestFocus: Check whether the west-side fan remains readable after the Hoboken addition.
Check whether Downtown Brooklyn, Atlantic Terminal, and Jamaica now create a clearer local decision cluster.
Confirm that current ticket values still feel fair with the 13-station graph.
